person.name: Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: "Tora Torbergsdatter was born on Giske in Møre og Romsdal, Norway. [...] SHE WAS THE DAUGHTER OF TORBERG ARNESSON AND RAGNHILD ERLINGSDATTER, maternal grandchild of Erling Skjalgsson and niece of Finn Arnesson and Kalv Arnesson.[...] "

parent.name: Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole

children.name: King Olav III Haraldsson Kyrre of Norway

zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske於1026年出生在挪威時，她的父親Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske37歲，母親Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole34歲。她於大約1048年與Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1066年之後在瑞典，埋葬在丹麥亞藍德洛斯吉爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske于1026年出生在挪威时，她的父亲Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske37岁，母亲Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole34岁。她于大约1048年与Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1066年之后在瑞典，埋葬在丹麦亞藍德洛斯吉爾德。

nameMeanings.name: (Amung)
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Maung, Sein, Zaw, Han, Kan, Chen, Khin, Ming Wai, Sang, Soe, Wai, Tun, Cho, Min, Tin, Than, Ba, Phan, Tha.

Burmese: from a form of address for a boy or a young man, used as part of the male name proper; it is interpreted as e.g. ‘younger brother’, but in formal use it is akin to English ‘master’ or ‘mister’. — Note: Since Burmese do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Thora
meanings: Teutonic: Consecrated to, or given by Thor

variants.name: Thyra
meanings: Teutonic: Consecrated to, or given by Thor

historicEvents.description: King Canute is declared ruler of Denmark, England and Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske was born in 1026, in Norway, her father, Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske, was 37 and her mother, Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole, was 34. She married Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson about 1048. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1066, in Sweden, and was buried in Roskilde, Sjælland, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske est née en 1026, à Norvège, son père, Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson environ 1048. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1066, à Suède, et a été enterrée à Roskilde, Sjælland, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske 1026 in Norwegen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske 37 und ihre Mutter Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole 34. Sie hat um 1048 Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1066 in Schweden und wurde in Roskilde, Sjælland, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske è nata il nel 1026 nel Norvegia, sua padre, Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson circa 1048. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1066, nel Svezia, e fu sepolta a Roskilde, Sjælland, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giskeが1026年にノルウェーで生まれた時，父Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giskeは37歳，母Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Soleは34歳であった。約1048年にHarald "Hardråde" Sigurdssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1066年以後にスウェーデンで死去し，デンマークスジaeランドロスキルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske(이)가 1026년 노르웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1048년 Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1066년 이후 스웨덴에서 사망했으며 덴마크 스jae랜드 로스킬드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske nasceu em 1026, em Noruega, seu pai, Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson aproximadamente 1048. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1066, em Suécia, e foi sepultada em Roskilde, Sjælland, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske родилась в 1026 г. в местности Норвегия, её отцу по имени Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson около 1048 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1066 г. в местности Швеция и была похоронена в местности роскаилд, сджaeлланд, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Thora Torbergsdotter (Amung) of Giske nació en 1026, en Noruega, su papá, Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson aproximadamente 1048. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1066, en Suecia, y fue sepultada en Roskilde, Sjælland, Dinamarca.
